OpenSea Your portfolio shouldn't live in five tabs. All your wallets. All your assets. One feed. NFTs and tokens, now together in one place 5 years ago, I released my first collection on . That drop opened my mind to an onchain art movement that was just beginning. On June 3, I return with [GLiFS.art](https://t.co/Yy7ShJrymq) This time, the collection won’t be complete without your participation.
